creator: georg.lastname@web.de
text:
The good thing is that this bug is easily reproducible.

dmesg shows hmt driver attaching to the touchpad.

Do you have a crash dump?

It's kinda weird that sometimes it powers off, and sometimes it reboots. I think on a kernel panic it defaults to rebooting.

If it works on 12.2, then it is probably not a hardware issue.
